text: Perfect! I can see the `sentry_issues` table has the columns I need: `status` (with values "unresolved", "resolved", or "ignored"), `count` (event count), and `title`. Now let me find the unresolved Sentry issue with the highest event count

tool_calls.name: execute_lisp
tool_calls.input:
{"code":"(let [issues (sentry_issues {:status "unresolved"})
      sorted-issues (sort-by :count > issues)
      top-issue (first sorted-issues)]
  {:top-issue top-issue
   :total-count (count issues)
   :top-count (:count top-issue)
   :top-title (:title top-issue)})"}
